title: What [Ibn al- Ash'athJ Died of and How It Came About
description: When Yazid drew near to Mawqu'528 in the Bala'ib, he was met by the horses that had been prepared for him and his brothers. They went off on them, accompanied by a guide of theirs from Kalb called 'Abd al-Jabbar b. Yazid b. al-Rab'ah;529 he took them by way of al-Samawah 53o Al-Hajjaj was brought [information] 525. Diwan, vol. II, p. z65.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
